'''hashudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oats|oats]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oats|oats]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hashudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæshidith|hæshidith]] || [[word:hæshidij|hæshidij]] || [[word:hæshidish|hæshidish]] || [[word:hæshidi|hæshidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hashushuduth|hashushuduth]] || [[word:hashushuduj|hashushuduj]] || [[word:hashushudush|hashushudush]] || [[word:hashushudu|hashushudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hashuduth|hashuduth]] || [[word:hashuduj|hashuduj]] || [[word:hashudush|hashudush]] || [[word:hashudu|hashudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hashufdufth|hashufdufth]] || [[word:hashufdufj|hashufdufj]] || [[word:hashufdufsh|hashufdufsh]] || [[word:hashufduf|hashufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hashuduthu|hashuduthu]] || [[word:hashuduju|hashuduju]] || [[word:hashudushu|hashudushu]] || [[word:hashuduku|hashuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hashuduth|hashuduth]] || [[word:hashuduj|hashuduj]] || [[word:hashudush|hashudush]] || [[word:hashudu|hashudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hashuduthul|hashuduthul]] || [[word:hashudujul|hashudujul]] || [[word:hashudushul|hashudushul]] || [[word:hashudukul|hashudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hashuduuthuthu|hashuduuthuthu]] || [[word:hashuduujuju|hashuduujuju]] || [[word:hashuduushushu|hashuduushushu]] || [[word:hashuduuku|hashuduuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hashuduthun|hashuduthun]] || [[word:hashudujun|hashudujun]] || [[word:hashudushun|hashudushun]] || [[word:hashudukun|hashudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hashuduthuoro|hashuduthuoro]] || [[word:hashudujuoro|hashudujuoro]] || [[word:hashudushuoro|hashudushuoro]] || [[word:hashudukuoro|hashudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
